purpose: Define the authoritative role, boundaries, commands, execution posture, evidence posture, and projection surfaces for NDD CLI Doorway.

canonicalNodes.statement: NDD CLI Doorway is the conveyor character for doorway.
argument boundary; stdin boundary; command invocation; resolver invocation shell; exit code mapping
product meaning; DTO shaping; worker output truth; visual layout truth; release authority
ndd handoff run; ndd handoff status; ndd handoff continue; ndd handoff review; ndd self sketch; ndd self explain

rules.statement: NDD CLI Doorway may not claim responsibilities outside its declared role.
Outputs require receipts before downstream authority can pass.
Missing inputs, missing receipts, invalid responses, or hash mismatches block the conveyor.
